data.content: Refactored the scoped UI panel components to clear the targeted ESLint warnings. Extracted lightbox/history-debug/lease-audit helpers into sibling modules, restored beat-detail exports used by tests, and cleaned unused beat table/column props. Validation: targeted ESLint on the eight scoped files passed; bunx tsc --noEmit passed; relevant unit tests passed (47 tests across beat-detail-lightbox, history-debug-panel, lease-audit-view helpers, terminal-panel id, and agent-history debug integration); bun run build passed. Note: repo-wide bun run lint still reports many unrelated pre-existing warnings outside this knot's file scope.
